Off Calendar May-15-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Scott Burrell, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY 554-3861, for defendants San Francisco Unified School District and Arlene Ackerman, Superintendent, moving for summary judgment and/or summary adjudication

COURT CALL APPEARANCE:
Michael F. Silberstein, Esq., 491-4400, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANTs San Francisco Unified School District and Arlene Ackerman, Superintendent's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT -- Granted. Re: c/a 1 - no triable issue of fact re: existence of complaint. Re: c/a 2, 4 - treated as Judgment on Pleading and granted. Defendant to prepare an order to conform with the Court's ruling and pursuant to CCP 437c(g). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN Chambers. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
